general.name: Rapid 7 Insight Agent FDA
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>98E9DE3B-D069-4CB6-988B-340505722A10</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>98E9DE3B-D069-4CB6-988B-340505722A10</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Rapid 7 Insight Agent FDA</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>830DDCBD-23BA-49A9-AA28-AEB3380E05B1</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.TCC.configuration-profile-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Rapid7</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>6047EF2F-2A0B-4A4D-9FF8-3797DF42F32D</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Insight Agent FDA</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Insight Agent FDA</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>Services</key><dict><key>SystemPolicyAllFiles</key><array><dict><key>Identifier</key><string>/opt/rapid7/ir_agent/ir_agent</string><key>CodeRequirement</key><string>identifier bootstrap and anchor apple generic and certificate 1[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.2.6] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[field.1.2.840.113635.100.6.1.13] /* exists */ and certificate leaf[subject.OU] = UL6CGN7MAL</string><key>IdentifierType</key><string>path</string><key>StaticCode</key><false/><key>Allowed</key><true/></dict></array></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
